narrative:
Bexley 3-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,009 registered voters, with 43.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 41.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 27.6 percentage points.
